rulings.Case Title: SAMETC, LLC et al VS. TED AND PAULINE ELMS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Hearing To Confirm Arbitraton Award
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, September 16, 2014, line 1. PETITIONERs SAMETC, LLC and JOHN SOLLNER's Motion To Confirm Arbitraton Award GRANTED. The Court concludes that the arbitration award was final and binding as to all Parties/Cotenants of the TICA. Therefore, "Final Award Re: Order in Re: Motion for Reconsideration Regarding Proposed Sale of Interests of Scott E. Jacques" is confirmed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: THOMAS AQUILINA VS. GERMAN MALDONADO et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: HEARING ON CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, September 16, 2014, line 6. DEFENDANT AGUSTIN RAMIREZ's HEARING ON CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION Denied, untimely per CCP 415.46(e)(1). All unnamed occupants were served by registered process server by sub-service, posting and mailing. No competent evidence provided to rebut the presumption of proper service. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BOARD OF TRUSTEES OF THE CALIFORNIA STATE VS. EDSEL JOHNSON et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion, Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, September 16, 2014, Line 9: DEFENDANT EDSEL JOHNSON'S Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment: DENIED. Moving party fails to sustain burden under CCP 473(b). No facts supporting surprise, mistake of excusable neglect are provided regarding Defendant's failure to respond to the case on August 11, 12 or 13 after the business trip and before the entry of default. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: KAUSHIK MULJI DATTANI VS. PATRICIA KERMAN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, September 16, 2014, Line 13: DEFENDANTS THOMAS RAPP, MARK HIDZICK and PATRICIA KERMAN'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS: GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Plaintiff failed to comply with the following provision of the Government Code and SFRO: (1) SFRO 37.9A(f)(1) - no effective certification that actions have been initiated as required by law to terminate existing tenancies through service of a notice of termination of tenancy; (2) SFRO 37.9A(f)(1)-(2) - list of units withdrawn from the residential rental market appears to be incomplete based on the description of property as 2400 Folsom Street & 3305-3321 20th Street; (3) Government Code 7060.4(c)(5)(A)-(C) - notice does not contain all the required information as specified in this section. Motion is otherwise denied. (501/REQ)
